meta.title: Future Airman - Selflessness
meta.description:
The Air Force is built on selflessness. The Air Force is built on duty, a strong sense of right and wrong and putting themselves into circumstance.

Flying through sound barriers, jumping from balloons in outer space and flying missions with low chances of survival are part of the everyday. You think of country and mission at all times, thinking faster than all others and thinking of the American's you keep safe.

You watch over the world and the Air Force watches over you. This is the Air Force. And this could be you.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
